creator: axl@iafrica.com
text:
Hi folks,

I just tested this out on a FreeBSD 2.2-STABLE (world made today) with
latest ports (as of 01H00 GMT) and the problem does not occur. I tried
with cons25 and vt100 with unadulterated /usr/share/misc/termcap .

I suspect Vince was experiencing transitory termcap troubles.

I suggest closing this PR until someone can produce more concrete
results.

Sheldon.
